markdown:
#  Generate a QR Code for a Submittal 
##  Background 
You can generate a QR code for a submittal using the steps below and then print it out to place it at a location on a job site. This allows project team members in the field to quickly access information stored in Procore from a mobile device.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permission** :
    * 'Read-only' level permissions or higher on the Submittals tool.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * Procore generates one (1) unique QR code per submittal item.  
_**Important!**_ You must scan this QR code using a mobile device running one of Procore's mobile apps. See [Scan a Submittal QR Code (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/tutorials/scan-a-submittal-qr-code-android) or [Scan a Submittal QR Code (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/scan-a-submittal-qr-code-ios).


##  Prerequisites 
  * 'Enable QR Codes on Submittal Items and Custom PDF Templates' checkbox must be marked in the Submittals settings. See [Configure Settings: Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/configure-settings-submittals-tool).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Locate the submittal that you want to generate a QR code for. Then click **View**.
  3. Click the vertical ellipsis![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=17), then click **Generate QR Code**.   
_Notes_ :
     * If the button is not available for use, see the Prerequisites above.
     * You can then use your web browser's print controls to either (1) print this page for use on the job site or (2) to export a copy of the page to the PDF format.
     * The QR code for the submittal is static. It is unique to the submittal and cannot be changed once its created.


##  Next Steps 
  * [Scan a Submittal QR Code (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/tutorials/scan-a-submittal-qr-code-android)
  * [Scan a Submittal QR Code (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/scan-a-submittal-qr-code-ios)


## See Also
  * [Configure Settings: Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/configure-settings-submittals-tool)
  * [Submittals - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/permissions)
  * [Send a Completed Submittals Import Template to Procore](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/send-a-completed-submittals-import-template-to-procore)
title: Generate a QR Code for a Submittal
description: How to generate a QR code for a submittal using the Project level Submittals tool.
